title: JOSEPHINE COUNTY ANIMAL SHELTER - 211info
text: JOSEPHINE COUNTY ANIMAL SHELTER JOSEPHINE COUNTY ANIMAL SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Protects individuals and animals, works to improve rabies vaccination rates, licenses dogs, enforces laws, and responds to humane complaints. Also operates a shelter that takes in and cares for cats and dogs and adopts out dogs, cats, puppies, and kittens. 1420 Brookside Boulevard Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 10am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 474-5458 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 474-5458 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. To license a dog, bring proof of rabies vaccination to Public Health Department at 715 NW Dimmick Street or to the Animal Shelter. FEES: Varies by service. Dog licensing fees are $25 for altered dogs, $45 for unaltered dogs. DOCUMENTS: Proof of rabies vaccination, proof of spay or neuter procedure AREA SERVED: Josephine County Services: Animal Adoption Animal Licenses Animal Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JOSEPHINE COUNTY ANIMAL SHELTER
